diagrams.title: Trophic Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of trophic levels with energy distribution
diagrams.purpose: Visualize energy transfer and understand why food chains have limited length

diagrams.title: Food Chain vs Food Web
diagrams.description: Comparison showing linear food chain vs interconnected food web
elements: Multiple interconnections showing alternative food paths (web)
diagrams.purpose: Understand complexity of feeding relationships in ecosystems

diagrams.title: Ecosystem Components
diagrams.description: Two-part diagram showing biotic and abiotic components
elements: Abiotic: Sunlight, Temperature, Water, Soil, pH, Air
diagrams.purpose: Clear distinction between living and non-living components of ecosystem

visuals.title: Structure Of Ecosystem
visuals.description: Visual diagram for structure of ecosystem
